notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Adrian Del Castillo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Tim Tawa. Brice Turang to 3rd. William Contreras to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Black GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Black grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. William Contreras out at 2nd. Tyler Black out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Jonathan Loáisiga on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers reached on error
